Variables.Name: BoneToModify
Variables.Description: Name of bone to control. This is the main bone chain to modify from.

Variables.Name: CopySpace
Variables.Description:
Bone to use as the reference framespace for our copied transform delta.
	If no reference frame is used, the source bone motion will be copied in component space.

Variables.Name: ApplySpace
Variables.Description:
Bone to use as the reference framespace for our applied transform delta.
		If no reference frame is used, the source bone motion will be applied in component space.

Variables.Name: TranslationOffset
Variables.Description:
Offset to use before applying the translation deltas (in degrees).
		This is useful for changing the direction of motion, relative to our reference framebone

Variables.Name: RotationOffset
Variables.Description:
Rotation offset (in degrees) to apply before the rotation deltas.
		This is useful for changing the direction of motion, relative to our reference framebone

Variables.Name: RotationPivot
Variables.Description:
Pivot offset (in local space) to use when applying the rotation.
		Any non-zero value will cause the target bone to rotate around the pivot, effectively introducing additional translation.

Variables.Name: CurvePrefix
Variables.Description: Curve prefix used for the animation curves. Format matches those generated by the LayeringMotionExtractorModifier

Variables.Name: TargetCurveName
Variables.Description: Name of the curve we're outputting motion to.

Variables.Name: TargetCurveScale
Variables.Description: Which component of motion we're outputting to the curve.

Variables.Name: TargetCurveComponent
Variables.Description: Which component of motion we're outputting to the curve.

Variables.Name: TargetCurveRotationAxis
Variables.Description: Axis around which to consider the rotation angle for the curve output.
